text.title: Prompt PR Review Checklist Core Rules
text.summary: 5 testable rules + 2 terminal conclusions every prompt-pr-checklist must enforce.

rule.statement: Every item carries a killer-anchor (incident_id / policy line / postmortem url). Decorative items rejected.
rule.rationale: Items without an anchor rot the checklist and get skipped.

rule.statement: Each pause-point sized 5–9 items. Working-memory cap.
rule.rationale: Above 9, items get skipped; below 5, the pause-point is too thin to catch anything.

rule.statement: Every item names an executor (role) + a completion artefact (link / screenshot / sign-off id).
Header declares READ-DO or DO-CONFIRM mode per pause-point.
rule.rationale: Mode confusion produces missed steps under stress.
Production reality shifts; stale checklists become folklore.

rule.statement: Repo uses prompt PRs AND owner named → publish checklist.
No prompt PRs OR no owner → skip; use a personal review skill.
